name: finance-semiconductor-overview
description: Use web_search to search for 'global semiconductor industry market size revenue 2025 2026'. Summarize the semiconductor market in 3 bullet points. Include market size. Keep response under 100 words.

ground_truth.reference_answer:
- The global semiconductor market reached $791.7 billion in 2025, a 25.6% year-over-year increase, driven primarily by Logic (+39.9%) and Memory (+34.8%) segments fueled by AI demand.
- For 2026, WSTS projects revenues of approximately $975 billion, with SIA forecasting the industry will approach $1 trillion, representing ~25% growth.
- AI-related chips drive roughly half of total revenue despite comprising less than 0.2% of unit volume, while the industry is on track to exceed $1 trillion annually by 2030.
key_facts: Global semiconductor sales reached $791.7 billion in 2025, up 25.6% YoY
2026 revenues projected at approximately $975 billion by WSTS, approaching $1 trillion
Logic products grew 39.9% to $301.9 billion; Memory grew 34.8% to $223.1 billion in 2025
AI chips drive ~50% of revenue but represent less than 0.2% of unit volume
